title: hordeum hystrix
intro: Hordeum hystrix, also known as spelt, is a type of ancient grain that belongs to the wheat family. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Hordeum hystrix include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve gut health, and support immune function. Hordeum hystrix can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
